app_subtitle: Search & rescue prioritization — Caracas and La Guaira
intro: This tool does NOT detect survivors from satellite imagery. It estimates, per cell, the **relative probability of finding people alive** by combining shaking intensity, structural vulnerability, population present at the time of the event, survival void spaces and elapsed time. Use it to **prioritize rescue teams**, not as ground truth.
disclaimer_sintetico: ⚠️ SYNTHETIC demo data. For operational use, set the real event in config.yaml (USGS) and integrate Copernicus EMS / Maxar and real population (Meta HRSL / WorldPop / OSM).
nota_modelo: The index combines shaking × collapse × population present × survivability × decay(72h) + field reports.
reportes_intro: Log calls, rescue-team or social signals. Each report raises the priority of nearby cells in its zone.
guardado_ok: ✅ Report saved. Zone priority will be recomputed.
